ID.title: ID
ID.description: A unique identifier for the wire.

Parent.title: Parent
Parent.description: The ID of the space that the wire is passing.

SourceBlock.title: SourceBlock
SourceBlock.description: The ID of the block that the wire is coming from.

TargetBlock.title: TargetBlock
TargetBlock.description: The ID of the block that the wire is going to.

SourceIndex.title: SourceIndex
SourceIndex.description: The index of the codomain of the source block that the wire is coming from.

TargetIndex.title: TargetIndex
TargetIndex.description: The index of the domain of the target block that the wire is going to.
